assignments.name: time_to_merge_hours
assignments.value: ={{ Math.round((new Date($('Filtrar PR Mergeado').item.json.body.pull_request.merged_at) - new Date($('Filtrar PR Mergeado').item.json.body.pull_request.created_at)) / 3600000 * 10) / 10 }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ rows: [{ cells: [ { column: 'PR Title', value: $json.pr_title }, { column: 'PR URL', value: $json.pr_url }, { column: 'Author', value: $json.pr_author }, { column: 'Repository', value: $json.repo_name }, { column: 'Commits', value: $json.commits_count }, { column: 'Additions', value: $json.additions }, { column: 'Deletions', value: $json.deletions }, { column: 'Changed Files', value: $json.changed_files }, { column: 'Time to Merge (h)', value: $json.time_to_merge_hours }, { column: 'Reviews', value: $json.review_count }, { column: 'Approved 1st Review', value: $json.approved_first_review }, { column: 'Changes Requested', value: $json.changes_requested }, { column: 'Task ID', value: $json.task_id }, { column: 'Created At', value: $json.created_at }, { column: 'Merged At', value: $json.merged_at } ] }] }) }}
